subject: Accounting
title: Window Dressing
description: A fast breakdown of Window Dressing for builders.

hook.text: Just before quarter end, a company repays a loan—then borrows it right back. Why?

buildup.text: Window dressing makes financial statements look better at reporting dates.

discovery.text: Companies time transactions to improve ratios, reduce visible debt, or inflate cash balances.

twist.text: It's often legal but misleading. The company on December 31 isn't the same one on January 2.

climax.text: Experienced analysts compare multiple quarters to see through temporary cosmetic fixes.

quiz.question: What is window dressing in accounting?
options: Timing transactions to improve reported numbers
